raw_transcript: That's because the Vancomycin doesn't kill the spores, and your microbiome isn't healthy enough to keep them from sprouting. This time, I'm prescribing Fidaxomicin—it's more targeted and has a lower recurrence rate. I'm also going to start you on a long 'pulse-and-taper' course of Vancomycin to try and catch the spores as they wake up.
final_corrected_note: That's because the Vancomycin doesn't kill the spores, and your microbiome isn't healthy enough to keep them from sprouting. This time, I'm prescribing Fidaxomicin—it's more targeted and has a lower recurrence rate. I'm also going to start you on a long 'pulse-and-taper' course of Vancomycin to try and catch the spores as they wake up.
